---
title: "data_modification"
output: html_document
---

Import required library
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(gtsummary)
library(kableExtra)
```

```{r}
dataset_path <- "/Users/sorenbasnet/Documents/Github/STAT_443_FINAL_PROJECT/data/genetic_contributors"
```

Read in data files
```{r}
data_patient_mutations <- read.table(file.path(dataset_path,"data_patient_mutation_march_8.txt"),header=TRUE, sep=" ")
```


Recode for death within 5 years 
```{r}
data_patient_mutations$surv_5yrs <- pmin(data_patient_mutations$OS_MONTHS, 60)
data_patient_mutations$surv_5yrs <- as.numeric(data_patient_mutations$surv_5yrs)
summary(data_patient_mutations$surv_5yrs)

data_patient_mutations$death_5yr <- ifelse(data_patient_mutations$OS_STATUS == "DECEASED" & data_patient_mutations$OS_MONTHS <= 60, 1, 0)
data_patient_mutations$death_5yr <- as.numeric(data_patient_mutations$death_5yr)
summary(data_patient_mutations$death_5yr)

summary(data_patient_mutations$surv_5yrs)
summary(data_patient_mutations$death_5yr)
```


Trying to test run with Cox survival 
```{r}
library(survival)

surv_obj <- Surv(data_patient_mutations$surv_5yrs, data_patient_mutations$death_5yr)

cox_model <- coxph(
  surv_obj ~ AGE + SEX + IGHV_MUTATION_STATUS + SAMD11 + NOC2L + AGRN,
  data = data_patient_mutations
)

summary(cox_model)
```


Kaplan -Meier curves for important genes 
```{r}
fit <- survfit(surv_obj ~ SAMD11, data=data_patient_mutations)

plot(fit, col=c("blue","red"), lwd=2,
     xlab="Months", ylab="Survival Probability")
legend("bottomleft", legend=c("No mutation","Mutation"),
       col=c("blue","red"), lwd=2)
```
